summary: First-finish smoke test of BloomNest AI. All 11 backend endpoints validated via curl (with Bearer token seeded in MongoDB). All frontend flows validated via Playwright: landing renders all testids, hero-start-btn redirects to auth.emergentagent.com/oauth/?redirect=...%2Fapp, cookie-injected /app dashboard shows life-balance-score=66, baby module creates 'Morning feed FE' via dialog and it appears in the list, coach starter-0 triggers streaming and msg-assistant-1 is rendered. ATS endpoint returned 500 once (LiteLLM budget-exceeded transient) but succeeded cleanly on retry with full JSON (ats_score=88, match_percent=92, matched_keywords, missing_keywords all present).
passed: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer test session -> 200 user data
GET /api/dashboard/summary -> 200, life_balance_score=66, sub_scores has career/baby_care/health/finance/learning/sleep/stress, suggestions[5], counts
POST /api/coach/chat -> SSE deltas + done event with session_id; GET /api/coach/history returns 2 messages (user+assistant persisted)
Landing: hero-start-btn/hero-demo-btn/theme-toggle visible; feature-card-0..5, pricing-free/pro/family, faq-0..7 all present
Baby UI: baby-add-btn opens dialog, baby-form-title fills, baby-form-save persists, item appears in list
Coach UI: starter-0 click, msg-assistant-1 rendered (streaming initiated)

failed.issue: POST /api/career/ats returned 500 on first call with LiteLLM error: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. Second call succeeded cleanly. Coach chat with the same EMERGENT_LLM_KEY worked at the same time, so this appears to be a transient upstream/rate-metering flake rather than a code bug.
failed.evidence: Backend log: emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0 (server.py line 387). Retry returned full JSON with ats_score=88.

action_items: Optional: add one retry inside /api/career/ats to smooth over transient LiteLLM budget-metering errors, since coach/chat continued to work with the same key.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (landing + auth redirect + dashboard + baby CRUD + coach stream)
